all.en: Hello Mr. Carter, we have great news regarding your recent online order.
all.zh: Carter 先生您好，關於您近期的線上訂單，我們有好消息要通知您。

all.en: Your order number SH-783291 has now been packed and is ready for shipment.
all.zh: 您的訂單編號 SH-783291 已完成包裝，準備出貨。

all.en: The package was handed over to our delivery partner earlier this morning.
all.zh: 包裹已於今天稍早交給我們的物流合作夥伴。

all.en: It is being shipped via FastTrack Express with a tracking number provided.
all.zh: 包裹將透過 FastTrack Express 寄送，並附有追蹤編號。

all.en: You can track your shipment using the reference number FT9923847501.
all.zh: 您可使用追蹤編號 FT9923847501 查詢出貨狀態。

all.en: Tracking information is available at www.fasttrack-express.com.
all.zh: 追蹤資訊請至 www.fasttrack-express.com 查詢。

all.en: Based on current routing, delivery is expected within two to three business days.
all.zh: 依目前運送路徑，預計兩至三個工作天內送達。

all.en: The package will be delivered to the address listed at checkout.
all.zh: 包裹將寄送至您結帳時所登記的地址。

all.en: Please ensure that someone is available to receive the parcel.
all.zh: 請確保有人在場簽收包裹。

all.en: A signature will be required upon delivery due to the order value.
all.zh: 因訂單金額較高，送達時需要簽名確認。

all.en: If no one is home, the driver will leave a notice with rescheduling options.
all.zh: 若無人在家，司機將留下通知單並提供改期選項。

all.en: You may reschedule delivery for up to seven days at no additional charge.
all.zh: 您可免費改期最多七天。

all.en: Your order includes one laptop stand and two USB-C docking adapters.
all.zh: 您的訂單包含一個筆電支架及兩個 USB-C 擴充座。

all.en: All items were inspected and tested before being placed in the package.
all.zh: 所有商品於包裝前皆經過檢查與測試。

all.en: Original packaging and a printed invoice are included inside the box.
all.zh: 盒內附有原廠包裝及紙本發票。

all.en: If you ordered as a gift, you will also find a complimentary gift card.
all.zh: 若您是作為禮品訂購，盒內也會附上免費禮品卡。

all.en: Please inspect the contents upon arrival and report any damage immediately.
all.zh: 請於收件後立即檢查內容，並盡速回報任何損壞。

all.en: Damage claims must be submitted within 48 hours of delivery.
all.zh: 損壞申訴須於送達後 48 小時內提出。

all.en: Returns are accepted within 30 days using our prepaid return label.
all.zh: 退貨請於 30 天內透過我們的預付退貨標籤辦理。

all.en: The return label can be downloaded from your customer account page.
all.zh: 退貨標籤可於您的顧客帳戶頁面下載。

all.en: We hope you will be completely satisfied with your purchase.
all.zh: 我們希望您對此次購物完全滿意。

all.en: Your feedback helps us continue to improve our products and services.
all.zh: 您的回饋有助於我們持續改善產品與服務。

all.en: For any questions, please contact our support team at help@shopline.com.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問，請來信至 help@shopline.com 聯繫客服團隊。

all.en: Thank you for shopping with us, and we appreciate your continued trust.
all.zh: 感謝您於本站購物，並感謝您持續的信任。

all.en: Real-time delivery alerts can be received via text message after enabling SMS notifications.
all.zh: 啟用簡訊通知後，您可即時收到送貨進度提醒。

all.en: Our customer dashboard also displays a live map showing your driver's current location.
all.zh: 本公司顧客儀表板同樣會顯示司機目前位置的即時地圖。

all.en: Eco-friendly packaging has been used to minimize plastic and reduce environmental waste.
all.zh: 本次包裝採用環保材質，以減少塑膠用量並降低環境負擔。

all.en: If you require a separate business invoice, please reply to this email by tomorrow.
all.zh: 若您需要另開立企業發票，請於明日前回覆本封郵件。

all.en: Loyalty points have been credited to your account for this completed transaction.
all.zh: 本筆完成交易的會員點數已存入您的帳戶。

all.en: Future orders over fifty dollars qualify for our free express shipping promotion.
all.zh: 未來消費滿五十美元的訂單可享免費快捷運送優惠。

all.en: Please consider rating your purchased items once they have arrived and been tested.
all.zh: 收到並試用商品後，歡迎您為購買的商品評分。

all.en: Photo reviews earn an additional twenty bonus points credited to your member account.
all.zh: 附上照片的評論可額外獲得二十點會員獎勵點數。

all.en: Our holiday gift wrapping service will become available beginning the first week of November.
all.zh: 本公司節慶禮品包裝服務將於十一月第一週起開放預訂。

all.en: Wishing you a smooth delivery and a positive experience with every item you receive.
all.zh: 祝您收件順暢，並對所收到的每一件商品都有愉快的使用體驗。

all.en: Same-day delivery is now available for customers located within twenty miles of our regional warehouses.
all.zh: 距離本公司區域倉儲二十英里內的顧客現可享有當日送達服務。

all.en: An optional installation service can be added to your order for an additional twenty-five dollar fee.
all.zh: 您可加購安裝服務，僅需額外二十五美元費用。

all.en: Returns processed through our automated kiosks are usually refunded within three business days.
all.zh: 透過自動退貨服務站處理的退貨通常於三個工作天內完成退款。

all.en: Our subscribe and save program offers fifteen percent off on regular recurring household purchases.
all.zh: 本公司「訂購省」方案為定期家庭用品提供百分之十五的折扣。

all.en: Gift recipients can exchange items without seeing the original purchase price or receipt details.
all.zh: 禮品收件人可進行商品兌換，且無需查看原購價格或收據明細。

all.en: Carbon offsets are automatically purchased for every shipment to reduce our overall environmental footprint.
all.zh: 每筆運送皆自動購買碳補償，以降低我們的整體環境足跡。

all.en: Our mobile application allows you to schedule package pickup directly from your front door.
all.zh: 本公司行動應用程式可讓您直接安排於家門口收取包裹。

all.en: Business buyers may request consolidated monthly invoicing for streamlined accounting and reconciliation processes.
all.zh: 企業買家可申請每月合併計帳，以簡化會計與對帳流程。

all.en: Customer service is available through live chat, telephone, and email seven days each week.
all.zh: 客戶服務全週每日皆透過線上即時聊天、電話與電子郵件提供協助。

all.en: Thank you for being a valued customer, and please reach out anytime you need our help.
all.zh: 感謝您成為我們的重要顧客，如需任何協助請隨時與我們聯繫。
